name: Feature Grid Cards
description: A 3-column card row with principle-card items, each containing a mini-label, card-title, and supporting text. Uses staggered rise animations for a calm reveal effect.

structure.html:
{{card_1_label}}

{{card_1_title}}

{{card_1_body}}

{{card_2_label}}

{{card_2_title}}

{{card_2_body}}

{{card_3_label}}

{{card_3_title}}

{{card_3_body}}

card_1_body.default: Fix the layout and spacing before adding visual polish.

card_2_body.default: Every effect should serve clarity, not showmanship.

card_3_body.default: Reuse classes and tokens to maintain visual coherence.

variants.name: two-column
variants.description: Two wider cards instead of three
variants.html_diff: Remove the third principle-card and adjust card-row grid

variants.name: with-icons
variants.description: Add icon elements above the mini-label
variants.html_diff: Insert an icon element before each mini-label
